channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: ReadBench evaluates bypassing text tokenization by rendering long-context documents as images for vision-language models
item.description: The technique builds on Google's pixel-only CLIPPO model design
item.content:encoded:
The technique builds on Google's pixel-only CLIPPO model design

Original source: https://github.com/teamchong/pxpipe

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/f3hapn0c

ReadBench turns established text benchmarks into image pages to test how well vision-language models handle dense documents without any text tokens at all. The evaluation draws directly from the pixel-only approach first shown in Google's CLIPPO work and measures real degradation across short and long contexts when models must read rendered A4 pages instead of receiving clean tokens. 80 1.6K 124 1.2K 192.6K FB B( BD RP DF RS T( SZ LB #72

  • Views: 142,708
  • Likes: 1,339
  • Bookmarks: 1,004
  • Quotes: 8
  • Replies: 42
  • Posts: 13

Top authors

  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Susan Zhang
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Ravid Shwartz Ziv
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
@suchenzang The trick is to choose the winning team long before anyone knows it's the winning team and then later keep rubbing it in with "i told you so"s. ezpz

item.title: OpenAI Codex engineering lead Thibault Sottiaux asks developers for tasks the AI coding model still cannot perform
item.description: Feedback highlighted failures in context window management and specific benchmark gaps
item.content:encoded:
Feedback highlighted failures in context window management and specific benchmark gaps

Original source: https://x.com/thsottiaux/status/2073551549494596079

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gucdu4mt

Thibault Sottiaux, engineering lead for OpenAI's Codex agentic coding system, posted on X asking developers to name capabilities that still feel surprisingly out of reach despite years of progress, drawing over 570 replies that zero in on recurring friction points. 1.2K 1.1K 16 107 103.4K BD MC TI BT KA NB DF #233

  • Views: 107,858
  • Likes: 1,132
  • Bookmarks: 113
  • Quotes: 24
  • Replies: 1,231
  • Posts: 7

Top authors

  • Dylan Field
  • Nathan Benaich
  • kache
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Tibo
@thsottiaux be better than fable

item.title: Yann LeCun argues AGI is nonsense, pointing to failure of robotics and autonomous systems to match animal intelligence
item.description: Zachary Lipton joked that making actual children listen is harder.
item.content:encoded:
Zachary Lipton joked that making actual children listen is harder.

Original source: https://x.com/ylecun/status/2073425439188484351

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/985oe41y

Yann LeCun's claim that AGI is a flawed concept stems directly from the persistent shortfalls in robotics and autonomous systems that still can't match even basic animal-level adaptability in the physical world, a critique he has leveled while stepping away from Meta to build AMI Labs around world models designed to close precisely those gaps. 179 2.4K 131 250 137.8K AN AG ZL YL #3

  • Views: 143,155
  • Likes: 2,388
  • Bookmarks: 257
  • Quotes: 33
  • Replies: 147
  • Posts: 8

Top authors

  • Yann LeCun
  • Zachary Lipton
  • Andrew Gordon Wilson
  • Aran Nayebi
If @ylecun can really make a 10yr old a first-time listener, this will dwarf his contributions to machine learning. Sign me up for the alpha!

item.title: Anthropic will develop its own drugs in-house to test and refine its Claude Science laboratory AI model
item.description: The initial programs will target neglected and rare diseases.
item.content:encoded:
The initial programs will target neglected and rare diseases.

Original source: https://x.com/bryan_johnson/status/2073413863245258806/photo/1

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/jinr7m1s

Anthropic is launching an internal preclinical drug discovery effort aimed at neglected and rare diseases, explicitly to gather real lab experience that will feed back into its newly released Claude Science workbench for scientists. 273 3.1K 144 346 214.1K RP JB BJ #316

  • Views: 216,092
  • Likes: 3,112
  • Bookmarks: 351
  • Quotes: 60
  • Replies: 213
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Bryan Johnson
  • Joscha Bach
  • Rohan Paul
cannot wait for better adderall

item.title: OpenAI Codex engineering lead Thibault Sottiaux plans to review structured user proposals to guide future interface updates
item.description: The move follows a user request to display individual reset expiration dates.
item.content:encoded:
The move follows a user request to display individual reset expiration dates.

Original source: https://x.com/Ananth7e/status/2073356210146030001

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/d3t0gmmf

OpenAI Codex engineering lead Thibault Sottiaux has indicated he will evaluate well-organized user suggestions when shaping future interface changes, prompted by one concrete proposal to show separate reset timers and their individual expiration dates rather than a single aggregate figure. 305 3.2K 60 260 195.5K B( JA TI #611

  • Views: 214,078
  • Likes: 3,247
  • Bookmarks: 262
  • Quotes: 31
  • Replies: 276
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Tibo
  • jason
  • Ben (no treats)
easiest way to this is to send codex a screenshot and tel lit to use image gen

item.title: David Sacks warns that enterprises feeding data to AI model providers risk fueling their future competitors
item.description: Chamath Palihapitiya backed the warning, urging firms to build independent AI systems.
item.content:encoded:
Chamath Palihapitiya backed the warning, urging firms to build independent AI systems.

Original source: https://x.com/TheChiefNerd/status/2073201584251486213

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/myxqr0tn

David Sacks flagged a concrete risk for companies uploading proprietary data, trade secrets, and customer information to frontier AI labs: those same providers could later weaponize the transferred knowledge to launch competing products in verticals like design, code, or security. Chamath Palihapitiya amplified the point, noting the pattern already visible in sectors where AI can accelerate returns on capital employed. 140 3.7K 199 1.1K 407.7K @J CP DS #192

  • Views: 206,456
  • Likes: 1,191
  • Bookmarks: 155
  • Quotes: 5
  • Replies: 50
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • David Sacks
  • Chamath Palihapitiya
  • @jason
I believe this 💯.

item.title: AI creator @deepfates jokes about maintaining a mental reverse hashmap indexed by punchline for constant-time comedy riffs
item.description: Danielle Fong noted others similarly apply data structures to social interaction
item.content:encoded:
Danielle Fong noted others similarly apply data structures to social interaction

Original source: https://x.com/deepfates/status/2073452702621900964

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/q4gyxcau

An AI-focused creator on X framed rapid joke recall as a constant-time lookup problem, describing a reverse hashmap in the mind that stores punchlines as keys to surface material instantly during live riffing sessions. 40 3.9K 116 364 90.6K 🎭 DF #756

  • Views: 101,739
  • Likes: 4,292
  • Bookmarks: 412
  • Quotes: 6
  • Replies: 34
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Danielle Fong 🔆
  • 🎭
many such cases

item.title: Meta's Lucas Beyer launches anonymous MoE poll, sparking debate over parameter scaling and routing efficiency
item.description: Commentators argue active parameters alone do not dictate actual model intelligence.
item.content:encoded:
Commentators argue active parameters alone do not dictate actual model intelligence.

Original source: https://x.com/tenderizzation/status/2073515995139059892

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/eh1g243l

Meta AI researcher Lucas Beyer dropped an anonymous X poll to surface unfiltered opinions on Mixture of Experts models, quickly igniting replies that challenge whether intelligence truly tracks only the active parameters while total parameter counts drive loss and knowledge. 37 131 5 18 22.2K VI AD T( KA LB #72

  • Views: 23,070
  • Likes: 95
  • Bookmarks: 16
  • Quotes: 5
  • Replies: 28
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • kache
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Alexander Doria
  • vik
I still wish we had something more globally aware than these routers MoEs are frustrating. What do you mean loss and knowledge scale with total params and "intelligence" with active? Wtf is non-knowledge-based intelligence in an LLM? That's not true humanlike sparsity.

item.title: Georges Harik's startup humans& deploys its third AI training cluster using NVIDIA B300 GPUs
item.description: The cluster was built with DeepInfra to scale model training.
item.content:encoded:
The cluster was built with DeepInfra to scale model training.

Original source: https://x.com/DeepInfra/status/2073526243472138388

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/51igvoaw

Georges Harik's humans& lab has fired up its third dedicated AI training cluster, this time tapping DeepInfra to bring thousands of NVIDIA B300 GPUs online for fully owned in-house model work rather than rented capacity. 13 173 25 22 26.6K GH NO N✈️ EZ #242

  • Views: 26,758
  • Likes: 157
  • Bookmarks: 21
  • Quotes: 6
  • Replies: 4
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Eric Zelikman
  • Niloofar ✈️ icml
  • noahdgoodman
  • Georges Harik
I’ve been learning so much about infrastructure and hardware choices and decisions these days @humansand thanks to @ericzelikman @Ani_nlp @zianglih 🚀 hyped for our model! Hiring @ ICML!

item.title: Bend creator Victor Taelin says the formal consistency proof for Bend3 fits within a single tweet
item.description: Taelin used the AI Fable to assist with the proof.
item.content:encoded:
Taelin used the AI Fable to assist with the proof.

Original source: https://x.com/onehotcoded/status/2073317377303830547

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/k8n1sd9j

Victor Taelin, creator of the Bend language, has described how the AI system Fable helped him complete a consistency proof for Bend after he resolved an underlying paradox, presenting the result as a straightforward technical step rather than promotional exaggeration. 82 911 30 332 84.4K TA KA #403

  • Views: 93,968
  • Likes: 952
  • Bookmarks: 358
  • Quotes: 7
  • Replies: 74
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • kache
  • Taelin
$3c
